response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The vocal performance matches the on-screen lyrics and the provided reference lyrics. 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics reference was fully utilized for spelling accuracy and to cross-reference with the live performance. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are closely synchronized to the live performance, with pauses handled correctly and transitions kept instant to avoid any lagging of subtitles.

subtitles.original: あっちで こっちで 踊って
subtitles.english: Dancing here, dancing there,

subtitles.original: 君ははたりばかり かまして 僕は
subtitles.english: you do nothing but bluff, and I...

subtitles.original: 夜を待つよ
subtitles.english: wait for the night.

subtitles.original: このままじゃどんどんダメになりそう
subtitles.english: At this rate, I'll slowly ruin myself.

subtitles.original: 夜を待つよ 夜を待つよ
subtitles.english: I wait for the night, I wait for the night.

subtitles.original: もっと混沌の海が理想
subtitles.english: A more chaotic sea would be ideal.

subtitles.original: 夜を待つよ 待つよ
subtitles.english: I wait for the night, I wait.

subtitles.original: 美しいホントよりも 汚した
subtitles.english: Rather than a beautiful truth, I want a tainted...

subtitles.original: 夜を待つよ
subtitles.english: ...night to wait for.

subtitles.original: 君を待つよ
subtitles.english: I wait for you.

subtitles.original: 今は待つのよ
subtitles.english: For now, I'll wait.

subtitles.original: いつかきっときっかけは来るのよ
subtitles.english: Someday, surely, the opportunity will come.

subtitles.original: 唇でゆっくり ゆっくり 騙して
subtitles.english: Slowly, slowly deceive me with your lips.

subtitles.original: ぼくはポップでチープなふりして
subtitles.english: I pretend to be cheap and pop,

subtitles.original: 真夜中までを泳いでは
subtitles.english: and swim until midnight.

subtitles.original: 君の目はうっとり うっとり 嗤って
subtitles.english: Your eyes mock me, utterly spellbound.

subtitles.original: 導火線が燃える中で今
subtitles.english: Now, as the fuse burns,

subtitles.original: 嘘をつくの
subtitles.english: I will tell a lie.

subtitles.original: 夜が来るまでは
subtitles.english: Until the night comes.

subtitles.original: 呼びかける数千年前から僕ら
subtitles.english: Since thousands of years ago, we have been calling out,

subtitles.original: 夜を待つよ 夜を待つよ
subtitles.english: waiting for the night, waiting for the night.

subtitles.original: 君がぜんぜんわからないから
subtitles.english: Because I don't understand you at all,

subtitles.original: 夜を待つよ 待つよ
subtitles.english: I wait for the night, I wait.

subtitles.original: すたりすたれた街でもいいの
subtitles.english: Even in a desolate, forgotten town, it's fine.

subtitles.original: 夜を待つよ 夜を待つよ
subtitles.english: I wait for the night, I wait for the night.

subtitles.original: 君を待つよ
subtitles.english: I wait for you.

subtitles.original: そうよ もっと切っ先を研ぐのよ
subtitles.english: Yes, I'll sharpen the blade even more.

subtitles.original: 最後最後 絶対笑うのよ
subtitles.english: At the very end, I will definitely laugh.

subtitles.original: 君を待つよ
subtitles.english: I wait for you.

subtitles.original: 最後最後 笑うのは僕らだ
subtitles.english: At the very end, we're the ones who will laugh.

subtitles.original: だって僕は星だから Stellar Stellar
subtitles.english: Because I am a star, Stellar, Stellar.

subtitles.original: きっと君はもう気づいていた
subtitles.english: I'm sure you already noticed,

subtitles.original: 僕の心の奥で描いた
subtitles.english: what I drew deep inside my heart.

subtitles.original: それがこれから話す陳腐な
subtitles.english: That is the cliché...

subtitles.original: モノローグさ
subtitles.english: ...monologue I'm about to tell you.

subtitles.original: ずっと言えない言葉があった
subtitles.english: There were words I could never say.

subtitles.original: 壊せない壁があったんだ ずっとさ
subtitles.english: There was a wall I couldn't break down, always.

subtitles.original: ふっと香り立つ朝の匂いが
subtitles.english: The sudden scent of morning rising up...

subtitles.original: どうしようもなく憎らしくて
subtitles.english: ...was unbearably hateful to me.

subtitles.original: 部屋の隅で膝を抱えて
subtitles.english: Huddling in the corner of my room,

subtitles.original: 震えていた
subtitles.english: I was trembling.

subtitles.original: 太陽なんていらないから
subtitles.english: Because I don't need the sun,

subtitles.original: 明けないでいて
subtitles.english: please don't let the night end.

subtitles.original: その手を伸ばして
subtitles.english: Stretch out your hand,

subtitles.original: 誰かに届くように
subtitles.english: so that it reaches someone.

subtitles.original: 僕だって君と同じ
subtitles.english: Because I am just like you,

subtitles.original: 特別なんかじゃないから
subtitles.english: not special in any way.

subtitles.original: そうさ僕は夜を歌うよ Stellar Stellar
subtitles.english: That's right, I sing the night, Stellar, Stellar,

subtitles.original: ありったけの輝きで
subtitles.english: with all the brightness I have.

subtitles.original: 今宵音楽はずっとずっと止まない
subtitles.english: Tonight, the music will never, ever stop.

subtitles.original: そうだ僕がずっとなりたかったのは<,s:
subtitles.english: That's right, who I always wanted to become...

subtitles.original: 待ってるシンデレラじゃないさ
subtitles.english: ...is not Cinderella waiting around,

subtitles.original: 迎えに行く王子様だ
subtitles.english: but the prince who goes to meet her.

subtitles.original: だって僕は星だから
subtitles.english: Because I am a star.
